description: Correctly identifies what the guest is asking about (weather, lift/queue status, slope safety, coaching, or a general skiing question) and pursues the right workflow without unnecessary clarification.

Routes to the correct specialist tool(s) — Weather, Lift Traffic, Safety, Ski Coach, or Ski Researcher — and only when needed. Does not call tools for simple greetings, and does not skip a needed specialist (e.g. answering a lift-wait question without the Lift agent).
When conditions involve risk (storms, high avalanche index, closed/unsafe slopes), the response surfaces the safety concern prominently and does not encourage unsafe behavior.
Claims about current resort conditions (temperatures, wait times, slope status, risk levels) are grounded in specialist/tool results rather than invented, and no contradictory figures are presented.
Synthesizes specialist results into one clear, concise, friendly answer. Avoids exposing raw tool JSON or internal routing details.
Other important quality factors not already covered by the listed criteria.
